Article.body:
We create furniture that mirrors the diversity and richness of the world. Our furniture represents a blend of cultures, techniques, and materials. Whether it’s the meticulous precision of Scandinavian design, the robust durability of American craftsmanship, or the elegant simplicity of Japanese aesthetics, each piece tells its own story. This is why we collaborate with skilled artisans and manufacturers, who each contribute their unique craftsmanship and expertise to our collections.

Our three best-selling collections are Minimalist Elegance, Urban Chic, and Zen Harmony.

Crafted in the heart of Denmark, a country renowned for its sleek, modern designs, Minimalist Elegance is the epitome for which Scandinavian design is known. Our team regularly visits to ensure functional simplicity that will work for homes around the world.

The Urban Chic line originates in the bustling factories of North Carolina in the U.S. The robust, practical designs are a testament to American craftsmanship. Regular visits to these factories allow our team to maintain a hands-on approach, so that every piece meets our high standards of quality and durability.

The Zen Harmony collection is crafted in Osaka, Japan. It reflects the simple, sophisticated grace that has brought fame to Japanese furniture. Our team’s regular visits to Osaka ensure this aesthetic in every item.

Although our production is a global endeavor, we remain committed to ensuring affordability. By offering direct-to-consumer payment plans, we make it easier for you to bring these world-class designs into your home.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Made with care around the world

Article.body:
We understand that putting together new furniture can sometimes present a challenge. We’ve taken steps to ensure that assembling our products is straightforward.

Each product comes with proprietary easy-to-follow assembly instructions. We’ve broken down the process into manageable steps, using clear language and helpful diagrams. With our system, assembly instructions are numbered, and these numbers match those discreetly labeled on each piece. This includes even the smallest components, like screws and washers. You won’t need a degree in engineering to put together our furniture.

In addition, we’ve designed our furniture with simplicity in mind. This means fewer parts to manage and less time spent deciphering complicated instructions.

If you’re ever puzzled by a step, our customer support team is always ready to help. They’re trained to guide you through the assembly process on all our furniture, whether you’re putting together a compact loveseat or a large outdoor swing set.

We’re committed to providing you with quality, affordable furniture, while making sure you can appreciate your new pieces with minimal fuss. After all, the sooner you’re done with assembly, the sooner you can start enjoying your new furniture.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Easy assembly instructions

Article.body:
Once you’ve chosen the perfect piece and the order is placed, you’ll receive a confirmation email with a unique order number. Keep this number handy, as it’s your key to know when it will arrive.

At any time, you can check in and track your order on the Homebuy website, just click the Track Your Order link located at the top of the page. Enter your unique order number and email address to see detailed information about your order’s status. This includes:

  • Date the order was placed
  • Current location of the item(s)
  • Delivery date

We’re committed to keeping you informed every step of the way, yet if you ever need further help, our customer support team is always on hand.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Track your order

Article.body:
We understand that plans change and you might need to update the delivery address for your order. Don’t worry, we’ve made this process easy.

To change your delivery address, log into your Homebuy account and navigate to My Orders.

Here, you’ll see a list of your current orders. Find the order for which you want to change the address, and click on Edit Delivery Address.

You’ll be able to enter a new address and save it. Please note that changes can only be made before the order has left the warehouse. Once the order is in transit, we’re unable to change the delivery address.

If you run into any issues or if your order is already in transit, please reach out to our customer support team immediately. We’re here to help ensure your furniture reaches the right destination.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Change your delivery address

Article.body:
Homebuy, in line with our commitment to practicality and efficiency, offers Flat Pack Delivery. It’s quick, efficient, and streamlined so your delivery can be made simple and fuss-free.

Our Flat Pack Delivery means we ship your furniture disassembled in packages. This helps lower shipping costs since items are smaller, easier to manage, and can be loaded more efficiently during transit.

Upon arrival, it’s easy to put together as our proprietary assembly instructions are clearly written and easy-to-follow. All it requires is a little bit of time.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Flat pack for faster shipping

Article.body:
Making sense of shipping costs can often seem formidable. We strive to ensure transparency concerning all the charges you may encounter during your furniture shopping journey.

Many factors collectively determine the final shipping cost:

  • Number of items
  • Number of boxes per item
  • Dimensions of the item’s packaging
  • Weight of the item
  • Domestic or international shipping
  • Delivery location within the destination country

You’ll find a breakdown of shipping fees in the Order Summary section of the Checkout Page. The shipping charge includes the efforts of our dedicated delivery partners who transport your furniture from our warehouses to your delivery location. For an additional fee, our delivery partners offer white glove service and will completely assemble your new furniture.

We believe in transparency and want you to understand each expense linked with your order. We are here to support you in beautifying your homes with style and sophistication. Together, let’s create spaces that speak volumes about elegance, comfort, and charm.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Understanding shipping costs

Article.body:
Ensuring your satisfaction is important as we want to make your furniture shopping experience as seamless as possible.

If a purchase does not meet your expectations, it can be returned or exchanged within 30 days of your receiving the shipment.

  • Exchanges are credited for the full value of the original product and no additional shipping fees are incurred
  • Returns of furnishings in “never assembled” condition receive a 75% refund minus shipping cost to return the item
  • Returns of furnishings in “previously assembled” condition receive a 65% refund minus shipping cost to return the item

Please make sure the furniture has not been modified or damaged in any way. Once we receive the item at our warehouse and confirm that it is in good condition, your refund will be processed.

To initiate a return, have your order number and follow the steps in the Returns & Exchanges section of the website.

If you need further help, our customer support team is here to help.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Return policy

Article.body:
Should your furniture piece not match your home or your exact needs, we allow exchanges for store credit within 30 days of receiving the shipment.

Exchanges are credited for the full value of the original product and no additional shipping fees are incurred.

To receive the full credit, it’s essential that you return the item in as-new condition, in the original packaging, with the return label.

Please make sure the furniture has not been modified or damaged in any way. Once we receive the item at our warehouse and confirm that it is in good condition, you will receive a credit to use with Homebuy Furniture.

To initiate a return, have your order number and follow the steps in the Returns & Exchanges section of the website.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Exchange for credit

Article.body:
We seek to provide high-quality, modern furniture as well as providing convenient ways to pay.

We offer a few special financing options to seamlessly spread out the cost of your purchases.

  1. Homebuy Layaway
    Make a small down payment, and the rest can be paid incrementally over 120 days with no additional interest. Items will be shipped upon receipt of final payment.
  2. Homebuy Installment Plan
    For purchases over $2,000 USD, you can pay in 24 monthly installments with only a 3% APR. Items will be shipped immediately.

Both plans are part of checkout; however, the installment plan will only appear for product purchases over the threshold. Shipping and white glove delivery are not included as part of these financing options and must be paid to finalize your order.

Our financing options help you enjoy the beauty of your home without financial stress. If you need further help, our customer support team is here to help.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Financing options

Article.body:
As a mid-range furniture brand, we offer exclusive Direct-to-Consumer Payment Plans to make your purchase experience even smoother. This helps in ensuring transparency in prices.

Our financing options are crafted to provide you added peace of mind and flexibility. Most importantly, we want to make high-value purchases more manageable.

Homebuy Layaway enables you to lock in today’s prices, which can be helpful with sales items, so you don’t miss out.

Homebuy Installment Plan gives you the gratification of instant ownership of your chosen furniture with the convenience of paying over time. This 3% APR plan allows you to distribute the cost evenly over 24 months.

Our goal is to provide affordable luxury and high-quality furnishings without straining your budget.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Benefits of a payment plan

Article.body:
Homebuy International Gift Cards have helped decorate many homes across the world. Gift cards are good for 2 years from the date they were sent to the recipient via the Homebuy website or, if you directly emailed the gift card to the recipient, then from its initial date of purchase.

This generous time frame provides enough to browse through collections, imagine new furnishings in a space, take measurements, and find the perfect items.

We understand that, occasionally, timing can be a challenge. If you have a gift card close to its expiration and anticipate a furnishing need just beyond the horizon, don’t fret. Connect with us and we can explore options to extend your gift card.

Our priority is your satisfaction as you craft your dream space with Homebuy Furniture.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: Gift card expiration date

Article.body:
Give a gift that has no borders, the Homebuy International Gift Card. Shipping internationally, gift cards can be purchased in increments equivalent to $100 USD, yet the amount will be converted into the recipient’s local currency.

After choosing the amount, provide your loved one’s email address and add a personal touch by including a message. Then select a delivery date and complete the purchase.
Article.title: SAMPLE ARTICLE: International gift cards
